name: Ace Checks Cashed
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers check cashing, payday loans, title loans, and installment loans with same-day funding at physical locations across Texas.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established consumer finance company operating multiple locations throughout Texas, including the New Braunfels area. The company has positioned itself as a one-stop shop for short-term lending and financial services, with both in-store and online options available to customers. ACE operates physical storefronts in New Braunfels, Seguin, and Universal City, with extended hours (typically 9 AM - 8 PM) to serve working-class consumers. The company has been referenced on CreditDoc as a check-cashing provider but has significantly expanded its service offerings over time.

ACE's core product lineup includes payday loans ($100-$2,000 online), installment loans ($100-$2,500 online or in-store), and title loans ($100-$5,000 in-store). Beyond lending, they provide check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, money orders, ATM access, and tax services. The company also offers branded card products (ACE Elite prepaid debit card) and banking partnerships through Pathward, N.A., including the Porte mobile banking app and Flare Account online banking. This diversified service menu allows them to capture customers seeking multiple financial services beyond traditional short-term lending.

ACE differentiates itself through physical store presence and same-day lending availability, which appeals to unbanked or underbanked consumers without digital access or credit history. Their multiple locations in the New Braunfels area reduce travel friction for customers. The company offers flexible repayment terms through installment loans rather than requiring full repayment on the next payday, addressing a key pain point with traditional payday lending. Integration of banking services (Porte, Flare Account) also positions them beyond pure lending into financial inclusion.

However, ACE remains fundamentally a high-cost lending operation. Payday and title loans are short-term products with implied high APRs, typical of the industry. The company does not disclose specific APR ranges on their website, making cost comparison difficult for consumers. While installment loans offer longer terms, they are still classified as small-dollar, short-term products with costs that likely exceed traditional lending. The reliance on physical store visits creates barriers for some consumers, despite online options for certain products. Consumers should understand these are credit products designed for emergency situations, not long-term financial solutions.
pros: Multiple physical locations in the New Braunfels area (3 stores within 15 miles) with extended hours (9 AM - 8 PM) for working customers
Installment loans offer longer repayment terms and fixed equal payments compared to payday loans, reducing one-time repayment burden
Online application options available for payday and installment loans, reducing need for in-store visits
Integrated banking services through Porte and Flare Account partnerships with FDIC-insured deposits
Same-day or next-day funding available for approved applicants seeking emergency cash
Wide range of ancillary services (check cashing, bill payment, money orders, money transfers, tax services, ATM) in one location
Prepaid debit card option (ACE Elite Visa) with no credit check requirement
cons: Website does not disclose specific APR rates for payday, installment, or title loans, making cost transparency difficult
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating risk of vehicle repossession if unable to repay
Short-term lending products carry high costs typical of the industry and are designed for emergency use only, not ongoing financial needs
Physical store requirement for title loans and some in-store applications creates accessibility barriers despite online options
No mention of credit-building features or reporting to credit bureaus, limiting ability for customers to improve credit scores through responsible use
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked workers needing same-day cash for emergency expenses before next paycheck
Consumers without traditional credit history or access to bank loans seeking installment loan flexibility
Individuals needing check cashing, money orders, or bill payment services without traditional bank accounts
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for working-class consumers in the New Braunfels area who need emergency cash with same-day funding and lack access to traditional bank loans or credit. The primary caveat is that all loan products carry high costs typical of short-term lending and should only be used for genuine emergencies; the company does not disclose APR rates on its website, requiring customers to inquire in-store or online for actual costs before borrowing.
services: Title loans ($100-$5,000 in-store, vehicle collateral required)
Porte mobile banking account (FDIC-insured through Pathward, N.A.)
Flare Account online banking (FDIC-insured through Pathward, N.A.)
